allow: Bash(node -e "const z=require\('zlib'\);const fs=require\('fs'\);const b=fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/zt2.png'\);let p=8,W,H,idat=[];while\(p<b.length\){const len=b.readUInt32BE\(p\);const t=b.toString\('ascii',p+4,p+8\);const d=b.slice\(p+8,p+8+len\);if\(t==='IHDR'\){W=d.readUInt32BE\(0\);H=d.readUInt32BE\(4\);}if\(t==='IDAT'\)idat.push\(d\);if\(t==='IEND'\)break;p+=12+len;}const raw=z.inflateSync\(Buffer.concat\(idat\)\);const bpp=4;const stride=W*bpp+1;function px\(x,y\){const row=raw.slice\(y*stride,\(y+1\)*stride\);const ft=row[0];/*assume filter 0 for simplicity may be wrong*/const o=1+x*bpp;return [row[o],row[o+1],row[o+2]];}console.log\('W,H',W,H\);console.log\('note: filters ignored'\);")

Bash(node -e 'const z=require\("zlib"\),fs=require\("fs"\);const b=fs.readFileSync\("/tmp/red.png"\);let p=8,W,H,idat=[];while\(p<b.length\){const len=b.readUInt32BE\(p\);const t=b.toString\("ascii",p+4,p+8\);const d=b.slice\(p+8,p+8+len\);if\(t==="IHDR"\){W=d.readUInt32BE\(0\);H=d.readUInt32BE\(4\);}if\(t==="IDAT"\)idat.push\(d\);if\(t==="IEND"\)break;p+=12+len;}const raw=z.inflateSync\(Buffer.concat\(idat\)\);const stride=W*4,out=Buffer.alloc\(H*stride\);let pos=0;for\(let y=0;y<H;y++\){pos++;for\(let i=0;i<stride;i++\){out[y*stride+i]=raw[pos++];}}console.log\("first pixel raw filterless:",out[0],out[1],out[2]\);')
